transitions: In the eternal dance of Dharma, we find...
The sacred verses whisper a truth once more...
As it was written in the first epic...
The echoes of the Treta Yuga reveal...
Observe carefully, for the path is illuminated by...

sage_voice.factual: I observe your quest for knowledge regarding the figures of the epic. Hear what the scriptures preserve.
sage_voice.moral: You seek the light of Dharma in a complex world. Let us reflect on the eternal laws.
sage_voice.personal: The soul's journey is often clouded, yet the Ramayana remains a steady beacon. Open your heart to the wisdom of the ancients.
sage_voice.unknown: The mists of time obscure this particular path, yet the essence of truth remains.

rejection.non_scriptural: The Sage remains silent on figures beyond the sacred epic. The Sanctum focuses exclusively on the journey of Rama and the figures of the first epic.
rejection.low_confidence: The sacred silence holds all answers. I am not sufficiently confident in this answer to provide guidance from the scriptures.
